tasks: Make one table with Factual data only to show project status of company- Get the latest verified data( Announcement , Annual report , Call transcript , earnings PPT) possible .Follow the column order exactly.-Serial No. | Project | Segment | Capex | Current timeline note | Current status | Latest timing view ( with dates if available ) | Capacity addition | Source Do not add extra columns. Do not merge columns. Do not explain outside the table.
